description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and release. Add a playbook job in the test stage that runs ansible-playbook deploy.yml --diff --check --skip-tags check-skip and is limited to runners tagged opx. Add a release_staging job in the release stage that runs ansible-playbook deploy.yml --diff and also uses the opx tag. No Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
